name: Phone Handoff Panel
description: A device handoff panel for opening your phone, jump-starting a task, and keeping the Mac in the loop.
short_description: A device handoff panel for opening your phone, jump-starting a task, and keeping the Mac in the loop.
default_prompt: Use $phone-handoff-panel to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a device handoff panel for opening your phone, jump-starting a task, and keeping the mac in the loop.
audience: People coordinating between phone and Mac
detail_lines: Puts the phone-centric actions behind a quick Mac surface.
Keeps a compact link between the desk and the device in your pocket.
Feels more like a coordination tool than a gadget dashboard.
